MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGAI, WINSON COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE WICK/MARCIA HOLMES, REPORTER C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFTS. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBTS, INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVID. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN.
